error_signature: Markers not visible on Google Map
title: Custom markers not displaying on Google Map
symptom: The custom markers from Supabase are not appearing on the Google Map despite being set correctly in the code.
applies_when: Markers are defined without full URLs
not_this_if: Markers are defined with full URLs
root_cause: Google Maps requires the full URL to the marker images for them to be displayed. Using just the filename without the complete path results in the markers not being rendered on the map.
fix_steps: Update the marker property to include the full URL to the SVG files
Ensure the URLs are accessible and correctly formatted
Test the map to confirm markers are now visible
agent_instruction: Change the marker property to use full URLs for the images.
